calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee To Fill Vacancvy
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brianna Mannion for petitioner San Francisco Public Administrator (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee to Fill Vacancy.

The Court noted it had reviewed the petition and supporting materials. Ms. Mannion stated that appointment of a successor trustee was necessary to administer trust assets and proceed with disposition of the trust property.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant the petition and waive the accounting requirement as requested.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee To Fill Vacancvy
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Continued To Dec-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
ORDER APPOINTING TEMPORARY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE TO FILL VACANCY AND ADDRESS URGENT ISSUES REGARDING REAL PROPERTY
